passive.name: Vicious Retrieval
passive.description: Every 4s, Faramis' next skill against enemy heroes and summoned objects generates a soul fragment on the spot. Faramis can absorb the soul fragment to restore 100 (+50% Total Magic Power) HP and gain 2 extra Magic Power (up to 40 stacks). Upon death, he consumes the absorbed soul fragments to reduce the respawn timer, each reducing the timer by 3% (up to 90%). Enemies that die around Faramis also have a chance to drop soul fragments.

skill1.name: Shadow Stampede
skill1.description:
Faramis enters the Shadow state for 3s, gaining 70% extra Movement Speed, 25 Physical & Magic Defense, and 20% Cooldown Reduction of this skill. He also gains the ability to move through terrain. Enemy heroes he touches take 250 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and are marked with a Nether Mark. Upon leaving the Shadow state, Faramis pulls all the marked enemy heroes toward him, dealing them 250 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage
Use Again: Ends the Shadow state early to pull marked enemy heroes toward him.
Soul Fragment absorption range is increased while this skill is active.
|stats1=Skill Cost|stats1_value=85/95/105/115/125/135
|stats2=Hybrid Defense Boost|stats2_value=25/30/35/40/45/50
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=250/280/310/340/370/400
|stats4=Extra Damage|stats4_value=250/280/310/340/370/400

skill2.name: Ghost Bursters
skill2.description:
Faramis gathers Nether energy in a fan-shaped area ahead, dealing 300 (+144% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies within. The energy will then split and bounce to nearby enemies, dealing 200 (+86% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage (splits up to 2 time(s) on enemy hero hits and 1 time(s) on non-enemy hero hits).
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=6.0/5.8/5.6/5.4/5.2/5.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=60/66/72/78/84/90
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=330/360/390/420/450/480
|stats4=Split Damage|stats4_value=200/220/240/260/280/300

ultimate.name: Nether Realm
ultimate.description:
Faramis turns his surroundings into the Nether Realm for 6s, making affected allied heroes (including himself) enter the Specter state and granting them 400 plus 10 (+5% Total Magic Power)% extra HP and 50% extra Movement Speed for 1s. When the Specter state breaks, the hero will clear all debuffs and enter a brief Resurrection state for 1.3s. An allied hero's Specter state ends when they leave Nether Realm.
|quote=Pain, destruction, death, rebirth! Enjoy the process!
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=90.0/80.0/70.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=150/250/350
|stats3=Extra HP|stats3_value=400/600/800
